lead.titleZh: RCT 显示超声引导经皮电刺激改善慢性外侧肘痛
lead.titleEn: RCT: Ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain
lead.paragraphZh: 今日日报共 6 条更新，涵盖 4 个专科方向。最高分条目是一项 RCT，关注超声引导经皮电神经刺激对慢性外侧肘痛的长期疗效，提供了高等级的证据。另有 2 项综述和 3 项观察研究值得关注。
lead.paragraphEn: Today's daily briefing features 6 updates across 4 specialty areas. The top-scoring item is an RCT on the long-term efficacy of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain, offering high-level evidence. Additionally, there are 2 reviews and 3 observational studies to note.

items.title: Unicompartmental knee arthroplasty and total knee arthroplasty in patients with 15 or more degrees of varus deformity: age- and gender-matched comparative study of radiographic and clinical outcomes | Archives of Orthopaedic and Trauma Surgery
items.summary: An age- and gender-matched comparative study investigated radiographic and clinical outcomes of unicompartmental knee arthroplasty versus total knee arthroplasty in patients with 15 or more degrees of varus deformity.
items.curatedReason: 对于内翻畸形超过 15 度的患者，单髁置换术与全膝置换术在放射学和临床结果上可能存在差异。这项观察性研究提示，在解释重度内翻畸形患者的手术选择和预期结果时，应更审慎地权衡两种术式。
items.titleZh: 重度内翻畸形患者单髁与全膝关节置换术的影像学和临床结果比较研究
items.summaryZh: 一项年龄和性别匹配的比较研究，探讨了在内翻畸形超过 15 度的患者中，单髁膝关节置换术与全膝关节置换术在影像学和临床结果方面的差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with varus deformity greater than 15 degrees, unicompartmental versus total knee arthroplasty may yield different radiographic and clinical outcomes. This observational study suggests a more cautious approach when explaining surgical options and anticipated results for severe varus deformity, carefully weighing both procedures.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性病例对照研究，存在选择偏倚，且随访时间未在摘要中明确提及。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective case-control study with selection bias, and follow-up duration is not explicitly mentioned in the abstract.

items.title: Adherence to exercise intervention including pain threshold, exercise and physiotherapy sessions for patients with chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy
items.summary: This study aims to investigate adherence to two pain threshold protocols during a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy, focusing on adherence to pain thresholds, exercise, and physiotherapy sessions.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项探索性研究，旨在了解慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在长达 26 周的运动干预中，对两种疼痛阈值方案的依从性。研究尚未公布结果，但它提示了我们应该关注患者在实际治疗中对疼痛管理策略的执行情况。
items.titleZh: 慢性肩袖肌腱病患者运动干预（含疼痛阈值、运动和物理治疗）的依从性研究
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在调查慢性肩袖肌腱病患者在为期 26 周的运动干预中，对疼痛阈值协议、运动和物理治疗疗程的依从性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is an exploratory study investigating adherence to two pain threshold protocols over a 26-week exercise intervention for chronic rotator cuff tendinopathy. While results are not yet available, it reminds us to consider patient compliance with pain management strategies during actual treatment.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确说明，且尚未报告具体结果和结论。
items.limitationEn: The study design is not clearly stated, and specific results and conclusions have not yet been reported.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Applications of ICF-Based Assessments and Interventions in Post-Stroke Rehabilitation: A Narrative Review.
items.summary: A narrative review synthesized 166 studies on ICF-based assessments and interventions in post-stroke rehabilitation, mapping 546 assessments to the ICF framework, with over 80% overlap with UK Stroke Guideline topics.
items.curatedReason: ICF 框架下的评估和干预在卒中康复中得到广泛应用，本综述帮你快速了解现有研究主要集中在哪些方面、与 UK 指南的契合度。但具体应用策略还得看未来更高级别的证据。
items.titleZh: 基于 ICF 评估和干预在卒中康复中的应用：一项叙述性综述
items.summaryZh: 一项叙述性综述综合了 166 项关于卒中后康复中基于 ICF 评估和干预的研究，将 546 项评估映射到 ICF 框架，与英国卒中指南主题重叠超过 80%。
items.curatedReasonEn: ICF-based assessments and interventions are widely used in stroke rehabilitation. This review helps you quickly understand current research focus areas and alignment with UK guidelines. However, specific application strategies still require higher-level evidence.
items.limitation: 本综述属于叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，且未提供具体干预措施的疗效数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a narrative review, which may be subject to selection bias and does not provide efficacy data for specific interventions.

items.title: Mechanisms of Idiopathic Neurodegeneration in Substantia Nigra Neurons: Biochemical, Physiological, and Immuno-Humoral Perspectives | Current Behavioral Neuroscience Reports
items.summary: This review critically synthesizes proposed mechanisms underlying idiopathic neurodegeneration of substantia nigra neurons, emphasizing age-related vulnerability and neuron-specific factors.
items.curatedReason: 黑质神经元特发性神经退行性变的机制复杂，与年龄相关脆弱性和神经元特异性因素有关。这篇综述深化了我们对帕金森病等神经退行性疾病病理生理学的理解，但目前仍停留在理论层面，对你直接的临床实践指导有限。
items.titleZh: 黑质神经元特发性神经退行性变的机制：生化、生理和免疫体液视角
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述批判性地综合了黑质神经元特发性神经退行性变的机制，强调了年龄相关脆弱性和神经元特异性因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Idiopathic neurodegeneration of substantia nigra neurons is complex, linked to age-related vulnerability and neuron-specific factors. This review deepens our understanding of the pathophysiology of neurodegenerative diseases like Parkinson's, but remains theoretical with limited direct guidance for your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，主要关注理论机制，而非临床干预或患者结局。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, primarily focusing on theoretical mechanisms rather than clinical interventions or patient outcomes.

items.title: Exploration of Exercise-Induced Gastrointestinal Syndrome in Endurance-Trained Adolescents: Is There Cause for Concern in Regard to Ultra-endurance Event Participation | Sports Medicine - Open
items.summary: An original research article explored exercise-induced gastrointestinal syndrome (EIGS) in endurance-trained adolescents, questioning the cause for concern regarding ultra-endurance event participation.
items.curatedReason: 耐力训练青少年可能存在运动性胃肠道综合征（EIGS）的风险，但这篇观察性研究对超耐力项目的参与是否应引起担忧提出了疑问。仍需更多证据来明确EIGS在青少年超耐力运动员中的实际风险。
items.titleZh: 耐力训练青少年运动性胃肠道综合征的探索：超耐力赛事参与是否引起关注？
items.summaryZh: 一篇原创研究文章探讨了耐力训练青少年中运动性胃肠道综合征（EIGS）的现象，并质疑其在超耐力赛事参与方面是否应引起关注。
items.curatedReasonEn: Endurance-trained adolescents may be at risk for exercise-induced gastrointestinal syndrome (EIGS), but this observational study questions whether ultra-endurance event participation should be a cause for concern. More evidence is needed to clarify the actual risk of EIGS in adolescent ultra-endurance athletes.
items.limitation: 这是一项原始研究文章，不是系统综述，其结论可能需要更多研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This is an original research article, not a systematic review, and its conclusions may require further verification through more studies.

items.title: Long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigates the long-term benefits of ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation for chronic lateral elbow pain, a condition affecting 3% to 4% of adults worldwide.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 为慢性外侧肘痛提供了新的微创干预选项。如果患者对传统保守治疗反应不佳，你可以考虑转诊或与团队讨论将超声引导经皮电神经刺激作为潜在治疗方案，但记住其长期效果仍需更多验证。
items.titleZh: 超声引导经皮电神经刺激治疗慢性外侧肘痛的长期疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验探讨了超声引导经皮电神经刺激治疗慢性外侧肘痛的长期疗效。慢性外侧肘痛影响全球约 3% 至 4% 的成年人。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT offers a new minimally invasive intervention for chronic lateral elbow pain. If patients respond poorly to traditional conservative treatments, you might consider referral or discuss ultrasound-guided percutaneous electrical nerve stimulation as a potential option, keeping in mind that its long-term efficacy needs further validation.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告样本量，且该技术依赖超声引导，对操作者的技能和设备有较高要求，可能影响其在普适临床实践中的可推广性。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report the sample size. Additionally, this technique relies on ultrasound guidance, requiring high operator skill and specialized equipment, which may limit its generalizability in widespread clinical practice.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation
